images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, possessing flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, and a fit, curvy body. She is inside a retro telephone booth, wearing a trendy, form-fitting outfit featuring a cropped baby pink camisole with delicate lace trim layered under an unbuttoned vintage denim jacket that highlights her slim waist and ample chest. The scene is illuminated by bright, colorful gel lighting—vibrant splashes of neon blue and magenta—that creates a high-saturation, energetic atmosphere without heavy shadows. Captured at eye-level, she is biting her lip slightly with a relaxed, playful weekend vibe, looking directly at the camera. The background is a blurred Tokyo street with bokeh city lights. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
